# Amir Khan

> Personal portfolio and command center of Amir Khan, founder of Setupr and operator of ALTERED.

Amir builds brands, websites, and systems end-to-end. 

## Ventures
- [Setupr](https://setupr.com/): An IT and financial services agency for Indian founders and SMBs.
- [ALTERED](https://altered.co.in/): A pre-launch D2C women's urban ethnic apparel brand.
- Alt: An on-premise LLM infrastructure project.

## Pages
- [Home](https://amir.setupr.com/): Portfolio, ventures, web archive, process, writing, and booking a paid discovery call.
